channel.title: GitHub HolyC Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of HolyC in GitHub

item.title: ZenithOS/ZenithOS
item.description: The Zenith Operating System is a modernized, professional fork of the 64-bit Temple Operating System.

item.title: cia-foundation/TempleOS
item.description: Talk to God on up to 64 cores. Final snapshot of the Third Temple.
